description: Tiana dreams of bringing people together through her cooking. With a little hard work and the love of her family and friends, she knows there is nothing she can’t do.
Inquisitive and daring, Ariel follows her heart no matter the risk. Whether she’s on land or under the sea, she’s eager to connect her 2 worlds, knowing they aren’t so different after all.
Ever gentle and kind, Cinderella believes in following her heart. She never gives up hope and is certain that dreams of happiness truly can come true.
Mickey just wants to make us smile. He is a talented star, gracious host, and a loyal friend.

Minnie Mouse is every bit a lady! She’s devoted to her sweetheart Mickey and always makes her friends feel special.
